metadata.name: Respond to a Request for Proposals (RFP)

description: A city issues an RFP for the development of a city-owned parcel of land. A development company decides to respond.

nodes.task_description: Thoroughly review the RFP document to understand all submission requirements, evaluation criteria, and deadlines.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a checklist of all required components for the RFP response.

nodes.task_description: Assemble a project team (architect, engineer, financial analyst) to develop a concept and proposal.

expected_outcome.value: A project team is formed and a project plan is created.

nodes.task_description: Compile the final RFP response, including conceptual drawings, financial pro-forma, and team qualifications, and submit it by the deadline.

expected_outcome.value: A complete and compliant RFP response is submitted on time.
